chain_summary: cand2/3/4/8/12/19-32/34-45 (WMI-1) establish divergent signals in psmgr_process_ctrl/psmgr_create/psmgr_connect/psmgr_setsockopt that write into psmgr_desc/psmgr_session; cand56/57/59-62/68/71/72/77/79-90/92-98 (WMI-2) show the resource persisting with inconsistent state across psmgr_process_data/ctrl/commit_req, psmgr_recvmsg, psmgr_connect, psmgr_setsockopt; cand107/108 (WMI-3) place attacker-controlled bytes into the authoritative psmgr_desc/psmgr_session fields; cand109/114-117 (WMI-4) hijack control flow through that content in psmgr_process_ctrl/psmgr_recvmsg/psmgr_exec. All 51 dropped oracles either duplicate a role already confirmed on the nucleus within the same function, or (cand99-106) sit on psmgr_sock, a non-nucleus object bearing WMI-3 only with no WMI-4 co-location and no confirmed dataflow path to psmgr_desc/psmgr_session. Boot stage did not run (no kernel image) - corroborating only, not required for this determination.
